summary: Web application with a Users tab and a /pricing page. Currently fixing non-responsive buttons on the /pricing page.
known_issues: Buttons on /pricing page are non-responsive (page loads visually but clicks do nothing)

existing_features.title: Fix all non-responsive button click handlers on the /pricing page (PricingPage.tsx) so that plan selection buttons, profile setup actions, and navigation-to-payment buttons all respond correctly to user interaction.
